verify_account.preview: Confirm your email to activate your account on Spybee
verify_account.heading: Verify your account

body.welcome: Hi {name}, thanks for signing up for Spybee! Please verify your email address to get started.
body.ignore_text: Don't worry, you can safely ignore this email.
body.link: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the link below into your browser:

reset_password.preview: Reset your password request for Spybee
reset_password.heading: Reset your password

body.request: Hi {name}, we received a request to reset your account password, click the link below to create a new password:
body.ignore_title: Did you receive this email by mistake?
body.ignore_text: Don't worry, you can ignore it.

password_changed.preview: We detected a password change on your Spybee account
password_changed.heading: Password updated

body.message: your password was updated successfully. If you made this change, no further action is needed.
body.footer: If this wasn't you, reset your password immediately.

two_factor_enabled.preview: 2FA is now active on your Spybee account
two_factor_enabled.heading: Two-factor enabled

body.message: two-factor authentication is now active on your account. From now on, you'll need an additional code when signing in.
body.footer: If this wasn't you, secure your account from your security dashboard.

two_factor_disabled.preview: 2FA was turned off on your Spybee account
two_factor_disabled.heading: Two-factor disabled

body.message: two-factor authentication was turned off. Only your password is now required to sign in.
body.footer: If this wasn't you, reset your password and re-enable 2FA immediately.
